criteria.not_ready: requires no Critical findings; Major and Minor findings are warnings in low mode.

ready_with_warnings.note: Major and Minor findings are warnings in low mode.

issues.title: Delete semantics are unsafe
issues.description: The spec allows deletion but does not define hard delete, soft delete, restore, or audit behavior.
issues.impact: Data loss and compliance issues can appear after code generation.
issues.fix: Choose hard or soft delete explicitly and define audit records, restore behavior, and API response codes.

prompt_mode: Readiness policy for low review level: NOT_READY only when Critical>=1. READY when Critical=0 and there are no Major or Minor warnings. READY_WITH_WARNINGS when Critical=0 and Major or Minor warnings exist. Major and Minor findings are warning-level findings and do not block implementation in low mode.
